name: 50 MG Cyclosporine Capsules IP
about: 50 MG Cyclosporine Capsules IP are recommended for dogs and come in the form of capsules. These capsules contain essential chemicals that are necessary for veterinary treatments and functions. The storage instructions require a dry place to preserve the efficacy of the product.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage for this product?
faq.a: The dosage of this product should be determined by a veterinarian, and should be based on the weight and condition of the dog.

faq.q: Can this product be used for other animals besides dogs?
faq.a: No, this product is only recommended for use in dogs.

faq.q: Are there any side effects associated with using this product?
faq.a: Some dogs may experience side effects such as vomiting, diarrhea, or loss of appetite. It is important to consult with a veterinarian if any side effects are noticed.

faq.q: How should the product be stored?
faq.a: The product should be stored in a dry place away from moisture and heat.

faq.q: Is this product available for purchase internationally?
faq.a: Yes, this product is available for purchase internationally, as we are an exporter, supplier, and trader.
